decisions.summary: public_contract compatible additive Story Journey output on clean HEAD
decisions.reason: contract_doc: docs/specs/story-vibepro-story-journey-diagnose.md defines the journey_context output fields, statuses, artifact kinds, and next actions. alternatives_considered: keep Journey only in PR Gate, add a separate command, or add read-only Journey Context to existing Story status/report/diagnose; selected additive Story output. compatibility_impact: existing Story fields, commands, PR Gate DAG Journey behavior, and Journey curation authority remain unchanged; focused and full regression evidence passed on clean HEAD. rollback_plan: revert src/story-manager.js, src/story-html.js, test/vibepro-cli.test.js, Story/spec docs, and design-ssot links in one scoped commit. boundary: Story diagnosis/reporting reads existing Journey status only; no change to pr-manager Journey gate ownership, Journey derivation, persistence, auth, or network behavior. accepted_followups: none.

decisions.summary: ADR差分なし: 既存Story診断/HTMLレポート境界内でJourney文脈の可視化を追加する
decisions.reason: alternatives_considered: 新規ADR追加、Journey Map本体の責務変更、Story診断への読み取り専用文脈追加を比較し、永続的なアーキテクチャ境界変更がないため読み取り専用文脈追加を採用。 compatibility_impact: 既存CLI/Markdown/HTMLの出力拡張のみで既存コマンド互換を維持。 rollback_plan: story-manager/story-html/test/story/spec/design-ssot差分を戻せば従来診断に復帰可能。 boundary: Journey artifact生成やcurated判定ロジック自体はjourney-map.js既存契約を参照し、Story診断はmissing/machine_derived/curatedの表示に限定。 accepted_followups: none.

decisions.reason: contract_doc: docs/specs/story-vibepro-story-journey-diagnose.md defines the journey_context fields, statuses, artifact kinds, and next actions. alternatives_considered: hide Journey only in PR Gate, add a separate CLI command, or add the field to existing Story status/report/diagnose; accepted additive Story output. compatibility_impact: existing Story fields and commands remain unchanged; tests assert new Markdown/HTML/CLI output and existing PR Gate DAG Journey behavior. rollback_plan: revert this Story branch changes as one scoped PR. boundary: no change to Journey curation authority or UI-source PR Gate requirements. accepted_followups: none.

decisions.summary: ADR unnecessary with architecture axis quality recorded
decisions.reason: alternatives_considered: add a new ADR, broaden PR Gate DAG Journey enforcement, or keep Story-level Journey visibility within existing Story/Journey modules; accepted existing-module approach. compatibility_impact: additive journey_context output in Story status/report/diagnose, no CLI option removal and no PR Gate DAG expansion. rollback_plan: revert src/story-manager.js, src/story-html.js, tests, Story/spec docs, and design-ssot links in one commit if the output contract is wrong. boundary: Story creation/diagnosis/reporting only; curated Journey remains owned by journey-map and PR UI-source gating remains in pr-manager. accepted_followups: none for this PR; future Journey IDs beyond default-product-journey should be a separate Story.
